title: Fibrinogen Early In Severe Trauma StudY II

skipped_criteria: Activation of local MHP and/or Transfusion of Emergency Blood Products: no schema field for massive hemorrhage protocol activation or emergency blood product transfusion.
FIBTEM A5 ≤ 10mm or TEG FF A5 ≤ 15mm or FibC ≤ 2 g/l: no schema fields for viscoelastic hemostatic assay results or fibrinogen concentration lab values.
Injury judged incompatible with survival: no schema field for clinician survival prognosis.
Randomisation unable to occur within 6 hours of presentation to hospital: temporal/logistical criterion not expressible with available schema fields.

Known genetic or drug induced coagulation disorder: no schema field for genetic coagulation disorders; anticoagulant_use covers only drug-induced anticoagulation partially, but the criterion is broader (any coagulation disorder) so it is skipped entirely to avoid partial misrepresentation.
Known objection to blood products: no schema field for patient advance directives or blood product refusal.
Dedicated prior fibrinogen replacement: no schema field for prior fibrinogen administration.
Participation in a competing study: no schema field for concurrent trial enrollment.
